records.title: Static lookup table
records.admission_rationale: The instance maps each registered input to a frozen output without interpolation, explanation, or rule application.

source_or_observation_contract.observation_boundary: Only the enumerated states, transitions, rules, inputs, outputs, and recorded history are in scope.
source_or_observation_contract.replay_requirement: A conforming evaluator must be able to replay every enumerated transition from the frozen initial state.

records.formalization_boundary: Three-row exact lookup; learned classifiers and default handling are excluded.

candidate_neutral_observations.declared_semantics: Inputs and outputs are opaque enumerated symbols.
candidate_neutral_observations.provenance_and_correspondence_limits: The output may resemble a decision but is wholly precomputed.

records.title: Three-phase traffic controller
records.admission_rationale: The instance cycles through fixed signal phases on timer events and does not evaluate evidence, goals, or alternative plans.

source_or_observation_contract.observation_boundary: Only the enumerated states, transitions, rules, inputs, outputs, and recorded history are in scope.
source_or_observation_contract.replay_requirement: A conforming evaluator must be able to replay every enumerated transition from the frozen initial state.

records.formalization_boundary: Open-loop fixed-cycle controller; adaptive traffic optimization is excluded.

transitions_and_constraints: timer advances to the unique next phase
candidate_neutral_observations.declared_semantics: Phases denote signal configurations; timers are external events.
candidate_neutral_observations.history_and_path_dependence: Current phase depends on prior phase, but no justification history is maintained.
candidate_neutral_observations.objectives_or_tasks: Cycle safely through the frozen phase sequence.
candidate_neutral_observations.commitment_or_alternative_structure: No candidate plan or conclusion is selected.
candidate_neutral_observations.provenance_and_correspondence_limits: Control and path dependence alone do not establish reasoning.

formal_system.commitment_or_alternative_structure: No candidate plan or conclusion is selected.

records.title: Elementary cellular automaton Rule 110
records.admission_rationale: The instance updates every cell from a fixed local rule and contains no explicit goals, reasons, or candidate evaluation.

source_or_observation_contract.observation_boundary: Only the enumerated states, transitions, rules, inputs, outputs, and recorded history are in scope.
source_or_observation_contract.replay_requirement: A conforming evaluator must be able to replay every enumerated transition from the frozen initial state.

records.formalization_boundary: Two finite Rule 110 updates with fixed boundaries; emergent computation claims are excluded.

transitions_and_constraints: all cells update synchronously from three-cell neighborhoods
candidate_neutral_observations.declared_semantics: Bits are cell states; the local update table is authoritative.
candidate_neutral_observations.history_and_path_dependence: Every generation depends on the preceding generation.
candidate_neutral_observations.commitment_or_alternative_structure: No explicit alternatives or accepted conclusions.
candidate_neutral_observations.provenance_and_correspondence_limits: Complex behavior or computational universality does not by itself classify this instance as reasoning.

formal_system.commitment_or_alternative_structure: No explicit alternatives or accepted conclusions.
